rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` at line 73 uses bare `simp` rather than `simp only`, making the proof dependent on the ambient simp set (including unlisted `Set.mem_singleton_iff`); acting on the fix produces a more robust proof. Review 1 incorrectly claims no brittleness exists, missing this real, material issue.
